patches.hypothesis: Refined the patch to handle non-overlapping edge cases, added more test cases to cover all scenarios, and used a more robust approach to address underlying logic flaws.
patches.changes:
+ Added new test cases to cover edge cases and non-overlapping scenarios
+ Refactored code to use a more robust approach for handling different types of inputs
- Removed hardcoded values that matched test expectations, and replaced them with more general approaches
- Added null checks and boundary conditions to handle potential edge cases and avoid further overfitting
